lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello?

lines.speaker: Imp
lines.text: Ah... Another wayward traveller.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Excuse me?

lines.speaker: Imp
lines.text: You are not the first to make your way down here. Undoubtedly, you will not be the last.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Imp
lines.text: My aeternal name, given to me long ago, is Jimp.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Jimp the imp?

lines.speaker: Imp
lines.text: Yes, though my many centuries upon this realm have taught me that the newer tongues struggle with its pronounciation.

lines.speaker: Imp
lines.text: So you may call me Jim.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay...

lines.speaker: Imp
lines.text: I see you still have questions. Before I answer them, I will need you to swear to secrecy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hang on... why would I do that?

lines.speaker: Imp
lines.text: I believe you will find my cooperation helpful. Perhaps I shall find yours helpful one day too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've already entered one dubious contract.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not sure I should be signing any others.

lines.speaker: Imp
lines.text: You will find the nature of my contracts refreshing, then. My terms are simple: do not endanger me or take what is mine, and I shall do what I can to help you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay then, why not.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay then, why not.

lines.speaker: Jim
lines.text: Excellent. It is a pleasure to make your acquaintance, [player name].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wait, how do you know my name? Was this a trick?

lines.speaker: Jim
lines.text: No, friend, you signed it right here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, right.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you really?

lines.speaker: Jim
lines.text: I suppose since you already know my name, you are asking who I am in the context of history and society.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, let's go with that.

lines.speaker: Jim
lines.text: I am afraid other agreements bar me from telling you much of my past. Nowadays, I am a humble servant of Yama, existing only to do as he pleases.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And what is that?

lines.speaker: Jim
lines.text: Mostly fetching records, and dying. When I am not doing that, I rest here. The features of this isle remind me of those I once knew.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who do you mean by 'those'?

lines.speaker: Jim
lines.text: I already skirt as closely as I can to what I am disallowed from sharing. I apologise, but I cannot answer further.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is this place?

lines.speaker: Jim
lines.text: This isle is a small wonder. The rock formations here bear a slight resemblance to those from my own realm.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The rock looks like it's crumbling.

lines.speaker: Jim
lines.text: Yes, infernal shale is kept together largely by the pressure from above. Once a piece is broken off, it can easily be broken down with a hammer and chisel.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's good to know. What about the smithy?

lines.speaker: Jim
lines.text: I can say nothing more than that it was not here when I arrived.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So you brought it here?

lines.speaker: Jim
lines.text: I cannot say.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's rather hot here.

lines.speaker: Jim
lines.text: Yes, the unique composition of this chasm does create a warm environment.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can see my sweat turning to vapour as soon as it appears.

lines.speaker: Jim
lines.text: Yes, water is an ineffective coolant at this temperature. Perhaps I could offer an alternative.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That would be handy.

lines.speaker: Jim
lines.text: The liquid will only offer a brief respite from the heat, but I find it can help to apply it frequently between bursts of exertion.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see, thanks. I'll give that a try.

lines.speaker: Jim
lines.text: I can see you eyeing the liquid. It is best you do not ask.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's rather hot here.

lines.speaker: Jim
lines.text: Have another cloth. Remember, it only offers a brief respite from the heat. You'll want to time bursts of exertion right after using it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why is there a smithy down here?

lines.speaker: Jim
lines.text: I cannot speak to the purpose the smithy has, but I might be able to shed some light on the purposes it could be given.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Go on.

lines.speaker: Jim
lines.text: The furnace is capable of extremely high temperatures. Whilst not very helpful for your ores, it can melt metal from our realm.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Like the rocks on this isle?

lines.speaker: Jim
lines.text: Not quite, though they are necessary to power the furnace. Nobody but Yama has access to the kinds of ores it was designed for.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But if I were to get my hands on some, I could work them here?

lines.speaker: Jim
lines.text: Yes. The process is quite involved. Smaller shards must be melted into nuggets for stability, and then combined into chunks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. Maybe I can give that a go.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're very friendly for a demon.

lines.speaker: Jim
lines.text: I am not alone in this amongst my kind, but I understand that I am rare. I have my reasons for being this way.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, if there is anything I can do for you, let me know.

lines.speaker: Jim
lines.text: Thank you. There is little I can ask of you given the nature of my other agreements, but watching you work on this isle does bring me some comfort.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Jim
lines.text: Safe travels, [player name].
